testcase.name: test_remix_variations_story_video_studio

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'quick_variations' in {'actions': [{'label': 'Create Part 2', 'target': 'story-video-studio', 'type': 'continue'}, {'label': 'Short Reel Version', 'target': 'reels', 'type': 'convert'}, {'label': 'Different Animation Style', 'target': 'story-video-studio', 'type': 'style'}, {'label': 'Funny Version', 'target': 'story-video-studio', 'type': 'tone'}, {'label': 'Kids Version', 'target': 'story-video-studio', 'type': 'tone'}, {'label': 'Turn Into Comic', 'target': 'comic-storybook', 'type': 'convert'}], 'quick': [{'label': 'Funny', 'modifier': 'Make it funny and humorous with comedic timing'}, {'label': 'Dramatic', 'modifier': 'Make it dramatic and intense with suspense'}, {'label': 'Anime Style', 'modifier': 'Recreate in anime art style'}, {'label': 'Short Version', 'modifier': 'Create a 15-second short version'}], 'styles': ['Pixar', 'Anime', 'Comic', 'Watercolor', 'Cinematic', 'Cartoon 2D', ...]}
